hero.title: Connecting Everyone with
hero.subtitle: Accessible, secure, and affordable digital financial services in Hausa and English.

problem.title: The Financial Exclusion Crisis
problem.subtitle: 40% of Nigerian adults remain unbanked. Northern Nigeria bears the heaviest burden.

unbanked.title: 65% Unbanked in the North
unbanked.desc: Millions of hardworking people in Northern Nigeria lack access to basic financial services.

languageBarrier.title: Language Barrier
languageBarrier.desc: Most fintech apps are English-only, excluding Hausa-speaking communities from digital finance.

trustDeficit.title: Trust Deficit
trustDeficit.desc: Cultural and religious concerns about conventional banking deter adoption in rural communities.

dashboard.subtitle: Track your progress and manage your money.
